name: groot
bio: A flora colossus from Planet X, the alien known as Groot exhibits enhanced vitality and the ability to manipulate all forms of vegetation. As sturdy as a towering tree, Groot forges his own way, serving as the team's silent but reliable pathfinder.
lore:
He is Groot, a flora colossus from the branch world of Planet X capable of manipulating plant matter and regrowing his damaged body from a single splinter. The hero at the heart of the Guardians of the Galaxy, Groot may not have many words to say, but his actions always speak for themselves.
Groot accompanied Star-Lord and Rocket on a scouting mission to Klyntar, where they became stranded after their ship was shot down. Klyntar's dark king, Knull, now seeks to corrupt Groot's regenerative powers in an effort to cultivate the ultimate symbiote.

abilities.name: Furious Flora
abilities.description: Perform a combo with his arms, and the third strike will slightly <Debuff>Launch Up</> the hit enemy airborne.

additional_fields.Range: The first two strikes can reach 3m, while the third strike can reach 4m

abilities.name: Spore Bomb
abilities.description: Throw an explosive Spore Bomb that splits into multiple small explosive spores.

additional_fields.Range: Spore Bomb generates a spell field with a 5m spherical radius, while small explosive spores create a spell field with a 1.5m spherical radius
additional_fields.Damage: The projectile itself deals no damage, while Spore Bomb deals 55 damage and explosive spores deal 10 damage
additional_fields.Casting: Single-cast projectile with a downward delay that creates a spell field upon impact
additional_fields.Special Effect: Spore Bomb explodes into 6 explosive spores

abilities.name: Thornlash Wall
abilities.description: Target a location and grow a Thornlash Wall. When <Orange>Awakened</>, it strikes nearby enemies attacked by Groot and his allies.

additional_fields.Cooldown: 2 charges, with each charge taking 6s to recharge

abilities.name: Flora Colossus
abilities.description: Wooden walls near Groot will <Orange>Awaken</>, activating an extra effect. Press {PrimaryAttack} while building a wooden wall to continue building additional walls.

additional_fields.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a 24m radius and a height of 40m
additional_fields.Casting: Persistent spell field that surrounds the caster

abilities.name: Ironwood Wall
abilities.description: Target a location and grow an Ironwood Wall. When the wall is <Orange>Awakened</>, damage dealt by Groot and nearby allies grants Groot <Buff>Bonus Health</>. Groot gains <Buff>Unstoppable</> while near Ironwood Walls.

additional_fields.Special Effect: Ironwood Wall heals 40 Bonus Health per second, up to 250 Bonus Health; gain Unstoppable status when within 15m of Awakened Ironwood Walls

abilities.name: Strangling Prison
abilities.description: Fire a massive vine cluster that pulls nearby enemies to its center and <Debuff>Imprisons</> them.

additional_fields.Damage: The projectile deals 10 damage, while the spell field deals 70 damage. While imprisoning enemies, it deals 20 damage every 0.5s
additional_fields.Casting: Single-cast projectile with a downward delay that creates a spell field upon impact

abilities.name: Wild Wall
abilities.description: Mantis enhances Groot's wooden walls and Loki's Rune Stones with life energy. Groot can additionally unleash a Wild Wall, which, when in <Orange>Flora Colossus</> state, restores health to random nearby allies. Loki's Rune Stones grant allies within <Orange>Regeneration Domain</> a <Buff>Damage Boost</>.
